meaning: n.浮渣,浮垢,糟粕,泡沫,糖渣,铁渣vt.将浮渣去除掉vi.产生泡沫,被浮渣覆盖
examples: Skim the scum off the jam and let it cool.
She never would have even spoken to scum like him when Mom was alive.
I speak to them about life's greatest rewards waiting in the removal of soap scum from the bathtub, which hasn't been properly cleaned since the first snowfall.
Along the way, we passed a murky expanse of water with oily scum on the surface.
There were small plastic cups filled with what looked like pond scum sitting on a nearby counter.
